about.page_description: A legacy of Vedic wisdom passed down through generations to guide your path.
about.title: A Legacy of Spiritual Wisdom
about.subtitle: Guided by Krishna's Eternal Light
about.desc1: Shastri Shree Amit B. Trivedi is a distinguished Vedic Astrologer with over 12 years of profound experience in guiding souls through the celestial paths of Sanatana Dharma.
about.desc2: Blending traditional astrological calculations with spiritual intuition, he offers precise insights into Kundli, Vastu, and Muhurta to help you achieve harmony and prosperity.
about.quote: nainam chindanti shastrani nainam dahati pavakah | na chainam kledayanty apo na shosayati marutah ||
about.bio: With over 12 years of experience in Vedic astrology, I've helped thousands of seekers find their true purpose and navigate life's challenges. My approach combines traditional Indian astrological principles with modern intuitive understanding to provide clear, actionable guidance.

timeline.item1_desc: Shastri Shree Amit B. Trivedi began his spiritual practice, rooted in deep Vedic scriptures and traditional wisdom.
timeline.item2_desc: Expanded services to include comprehensive Vastu Shastra and traditional Vedic Pooja ceremonies.
timeline.item3_desc: Started providing online consultations, reaching seekers across the globe and guiding them through digital platforms.
timeline.item4_desc: With thousands of satisfied clients, we continue to be a beacon of clarity in life's complexities.

values.v1_desc: Every consultation is approached with deep empathy and a soul-centered perspective.
values.v2_desc: Our readings are strictly based on authentic Vedic scriptures and calculations.
values.v3_desc: We maintain total confidentiality and build lifelong bonds with those we guide.
values.v4_desc: Striving for 100% accuracy through continuous study and spiritual alignment.

about.philosophy_desc: Our process involves more than just reading birth charts. We dive deep into your unique karmic journey, aligning ancient celestial wisdom with your current aspirations. Every soul has a unique cosmic design, and our role is to help you understand and harmonize with it for a fulfilling life.

services.title_home: Spiritual Solutions For Your Life Journey

services.page_description: Comprehensive Vedic solutions for health, wealth, relationships, and spiritual growth.

mahamrityunjay.desc: A life-giving invocation for profound healing, spiritual protection, and longevity through sacred vibrations.

rudra.desc: A transcendental offering to Lord Shiva to clear spiritual paths, ensuring inner peace and abundance.

kaal_sarp.desc: Specific ritual to remove karmic obstacles and ensure a smooth path forward in life.

shanti_path.desc: Universal Vedic chanting for absolute peace, prosperity, and cosmic harmony in your space.

sunderkand.title: Sunderkand Path
sunderkand.desc: Glorification of Lord Hanuman's divine deeds for courage, protection from negativity, and success.

service_detail.book_subtitle: Speak with Shastri Shree Amit B. Trivedi today for expert guidance.

janam_kundli_analysis.title: Janam Kundli Analysis
janam_kundli_analysis.subtitle: Unlock Your Destiny Through Planetary Wisdom
janam_kundli_analysis.description: Your Janam Kundali is a cosmic blueprint of your life. Our expert analysis helps you understand your strengths, weaknesses, and the timing of major life events based on precise planetary positions at your birth.

vedic_pooja_yagya.title: Vedic Pooja & Yagya
vedic_pooja_yagya.subtitle: Divine Blessings for Peace and Prosperity
vedic_pooja_yagya.description: Sacred Vedic rituals performed with authentic mantras and pure intentions to invoke divine energies for your well-being and success.

karmakand_vidhi.title: Karmakand Vidhi
karmakand_vidhi.subtitle: Traditional Sacred Rituals Done Right
karmakand_vidhi.description: Expert performance of all Sanskaras and Vedic ceremonies following rigid scriptural traditions for maximum spiritual impact.

vastu_consultation.title: Vastu Consultation
vastu_consultation.subtitle: Harmonize Your Environment for Success
vastu_consultation.description: Align your living or workspace with the five elements (Pancha Bhoota) to attract health, wealth, and happiness into your life.

marriage_matching.title: Marriage Matching
marriage_matching.subtitle: Guna Milan for Lifelong Harmony
marriage_matching.description: Ensure marital bliss using Vedic Ashtakoota matching to analyze emotional, spiritual, and financial compatibility between partners.

business_career_guidance.title: Business & Career Guidance
business_career_guidance.subtitle: Cosmic Strategy for Professional Growth
business_career_guidance.description: Identify the right profession and identify periods of peak performance to maximize your career success and business stability.

gemstone_advice.title: Gemstone Advice
gemstone_advice.subtitle: Planetary Power in Your Palm
gemstone_advice.description: Scientific and astrological recommendation of precious gemstones to strengthen your auspicious planets and neutralize harmful influences.

tarot_reading.title: Tarot Reading
tarot_reading.subtitle: Intuitive Guidance for Life's Questions
tarot_reading.description: Gain deeper insights into your subconscious and current energy patterns to find clear answers for love, career, and personal choices.

numerology.title: Numerology
numerology.subtitle: The Science of Vibrational Success
numerology.description: Harness the power of numbers by correcting your name spelling and identifying your lucky dates to resonate with success and harmony.
